tasks.title: Add .jsonc (JSON with Comments) file format support
tasks.description: Audit all existing files that utilize .json format and add support for .jsonc (JSON with Comments) format. When both .json and .jsonc versions of a file exist, the .json file takes precedence. Files must be checked in precedence order: first for .json, then fallback to .jsonc if .json is not present. This applies to queue files (queue.json/queue.jsonc), done files (done.json/done.jsonc), and config files (config.json/config.jsonc).
evidence: User request: Audit all existing files that utilize .json format. Add support for .jsonc (JSON comments) format.
Precedence rule: .json files take precedence over .jsonc files (e.g. config.json takes precedence over config.jsonc if both are present)
Existing jsonc.rs module provides parse_jsonc() function for parsing JSONC with comments
Current queue.json and done.json loading uses jsonc::parse_jsonc() which already supports comments
Config files currently only look for .json extension - need to add .jsonc fallback
plan: Audit all JSON file usage in the codebase:
- queue.json / done.json in queue.rs (already uses parse_jsonc)
- config.json in config.rs (global and project config)
- Any other JSON files (session, cache, migration files)
Modify config loading to support .jsonc files with .json precedence:
- Update global_config_path() to check for config.jsonc if config.json doesn't exist
- Update project_config_path() or load_layer() to check for .jsonc fallback
- Ensure .json takes precedence when both exist
Update file path resolution helpers in config.rs:
- Modify resolve_queue_path() to support queue.jsonc fallback
- Modify resolve_done_path() to support done.jsonc fallback
Add helper function for JSON/JSONC file discovery:
- Create resolve_json_path() or similar that checks .json then .jsonc
Update find_repo_root() to also check for .jsonc files when detecting repo root
Add tests for .jsonc support:
- Test that .json takes precedence over .jsonc when both exist
- Test that .jsonc is used when .json doesn't exist
- Test parsing of comments in .jsonc files
Update documentation if needed (config.md, queue-and-tasks.md)
Run make macos-ci to ensure all tests pass
tasks.request: Audit all existing files that utilize .json format. Add support for .jsonc (JSON comments) format. .json files take precedence over .jsonc files (e.g. config.json takes precedence over config.jsonc if both are present) but both are supported.

custom_fields.affected_areas: config loading, queue loading, repo root detection
